query:
SELECT sc.id, sc.confirm_token, sc.status, sc.expires_at, s.name as supplier_name, mp.filename 
FROM supplier_confirmations sc 
LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON sc.supplier_id = s.id 
LEFT JOIN material_plans mp ON sc.plan_id = mp.id 
ORDER BY sc.created_at DESC 
LIMIT 5;
